history.content:
<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead and two cells to the right of my location. The cell in front of me is a deadly lava cell (L), so I cannot move forward. The cell to my right is a safe floor (.) while the left is a wall (#). I will turn right to face the safe floor and move towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is on a floor cell facing up. The cell directly ahead (up) is a floor cell (.), safe to move into. To the left is a lava cell (L) and to the right is a wall (#), so moving forward is the only safe immediate action. The goal (G) is visible two rows up and two columns left, reachable by moving forward, then turning and navigating around the wall.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible at row 5, column 1. I am at row 6, column 3 facing north. Moving forward would put me at (5,3), which is safe, but then the cell to the west (5,2) is lava, blocking direct access to the goal. Instead, I can safely reach G by first heading west on my current row through safe floor cells (6,2) and (6,1), then turning north. Therefore, I should turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead in the direction I am facing (north). The cell directly in front of me is an empty floor (.), which is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without danger.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is represented by `^` at the bottom-center of the local view, facing upward. The cell directly ahead (row above) is a safe floor `.`. The goal `G` is located one cell ahead and one cell to the right. The cells immediately to the left and right of the agent are lava `L`, so turning and moving would be deadly. Moving forward is the only safe action and will bring the agent closer to the goal, from where it can later turn right and step onto the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly to my right (east), and the cell in front of me (north) is a wall. I will turn right to face the goal, then I can move forward in the next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of the agent (one cell north). No lava or wall blocks the path. Moving forward will lead to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
